custom_fields.status: Either 'present' (file exists on disk) or 'reserved' (canonical slot defined by the contract but not yet committed).
custom_fields.owner_role: Short role string responsible for keeping the file fresh (e.g. `Repository maintainers`, `API maintainers`).
custom_fields.approx_token_budget: Estimated upper bound on tokens at ~80 chars per line and ~4 chars per token; derived from `line_budget`.
custom_fields.role: Short label for the file kind (e.g. `navigation-hub`, `deep-doc`, `contract`).
custom_fields.notes: Optional human-facing annotation; e.g. flags advisory budgets that exceed contract targets.
